chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. CONST. PETITION No. D-7473 OF 2015 Date Order with signature of Judge Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No. 37399/2015 2. For hearing of Main Case 04.10.2021 Mr. Nabi Bux Leghari Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Abdul Jalil Zubedi, AAG..... It is pointed out that the mining permit issued in favour of the Petitioner was valid up to 15.07.2014. In the wake of above, petitioner may avail remedy provided under the law, if so advised. Petition alongwith listed application stands disposed of in above terms. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Amjad/PS
